process.title: How We Take You From Zero to Suburb Domination in 30 Days
process.subtitle: "From 'I don't know if this will work' to 'This is actually working' in 30 days"

steps.title: We Build Your Suburb Domination Blueprint

bullets.text: Welcome package lands on your desk within 48 hours (you're officially locked in)
60-min strategy session with Blake: we audit your suburb, analyze your top 5 competitors, and map your differentiation strategy
Custom Script Vault delivered: 30-50 proven hooks written specifically for your suburb (no other agent can use these)
Quick tech call: we test your first clip and confirm you're ready (takes 15 minutes)

steps.title: You Film 15 Minutes, We Do Everything Else

bullets.text: You film 3 clips in 15 minutes using Script Vault (we tell you exactly what to say)
Send us the raw footage - you never edit, never schedule, never write captions
We edit, polish, add captions/music/branding while you go back to selling

steps.title: You Go Live (And Start Getting Noticed)

bullets.text: We edit your clips into 2-3 polished, platform-optimised videos
You review and approve each one (nothing posts without your OK)
First videos go live - you're now visible on Instagram, TikTok, Facebook
Residents in your suburb start seeing your name. Competitors wonder what you're doing.

steps.title: You're Now the Agent Everyone Sees

bullets.text: Posting 10x/month across all platforms — you're consistent, professional, everywhere your competitors aren't
DMs start flowing - our tracking shows exactly which videos are generating enquiries (you know what's working)
LinkedIn repurposing kicks in - investors and commercial buyers see your content (2 posts/week, zero extra filming)
Every Monday: 60-sec voice note tells you exactly what to film this week (no more "what should I post?")
fter 30 days: Your first Celebrity Report arrives - proof you're outpacing your competitors, plus data from 1,200+ videos tested across our network

qualification.title: This ISN'T for Everyone
qualification.subtitle: We're selective about who we work with. Here's why:

dontApply.title: You're happy with 3–5 deals per year
dontApply.description: This is for agents who want to dominate, not just survive

dontApply.title: You don't want to be on camera
dontApply.description: Personal brand = you need to show your face

dontApply.title: You have less than 2 years experience
dontApply.description: Content amplifies what you already do well — you need a foundation first

dontApply.title: Your area has fewer than 500 properties
dontApply.description: Market too small for the area exclusivity model to work effectively

dontApply.title: You want instant results
dontApply.description: This is a 3-6 month play. If you need listings tomorrow, this isn't it.

perfectIf.title: Close 10+ deals annually and want to double it
perfectIf.description: You have the skills, now we amplify your reach

perfectIf.title: Understand that personal brand = premium positioning
perfectIf.description: You're ready to be THE local expert

perfectIf.title: Want to work smarter, not harder
perfectIf.description: Let content work while you're at open homes

perfectIf.title: Willing to commit 2 hours/month to filming

items.question: What does 'suburb exclusivity' mean?
items.answer: We only work with one agent per suburb. When you sign up, we lock down your territory and turn away every other agent who operates in that area.

items.question: How much time do I need to commit?
items.answer: 15 minutes per week. That's it. You film 3 short clips (5 min each) on Wednesday. Text them to us. We handle everything else: editing, captions, posting, strategy, analytics.

items.question: How quickly will I see results?
items.answer:
Week 1: First videos go live (you're now visible)
Week 2-3: Residents start recognising you ("I saw your video about 1 Blake Street")
Week 4: First DMs arrive from people asking about listings
Month 2-3: Consistent enquiries (our attribution tracking shows which videos are working)
Month 6+: You're the agent everyone knows in your suburb

items.question: What kind of videos do you create?
items.answer:
We create 10 short-form videos per month (30-60 seconds) designed to make you the celebrity agent in your suburb:
✓ Market updates with local insights ("3 streets in [Suburb] with best value right now")
✓ Property spotlights ("Just sold in [Street Name] - here's what that means for your value")
✓ Local area features ("[School Zone] just changed - what parents need to know")
✓ "Guess the Price" videos (high engagement, gets people commenting)
✓ Buyer/seller education ("3 things first-home buyers miss about [Suburb]")

items.question: I already post videos myself / I already have a videographer. Why do I need this?
items.answer:
If you're posting yourself:

You're guessing what content works (we test videos/month and give you the winning formulas)
You're spending 3-4 hours/week editing (we do it in 15 min/week from you)
You don't have attribution tracking (we show you which videos generate DMs)

If you have a videographer:

They film and edit, but who's doing strategy? (We provide monthly data showing what's working across our network)
Are they posting consistently for you? (We ghost-post 10x/month — you never touch the apps)
Do they have suburb exclusivity? (Anyone can hire them, including your competitors)

items.question: What if I'm camera shy / not good on camera?
items.answer:
Here's why it's easier than you think:
✓ Custom Script Vault: We give you exact words to say (30-50 proven hooks for your suburb)
✓ Monday Content Menu: Every week, 60-sec voice note tells you what to film (zero guesswork)
✓ Retake freedom: Film 3 takes, we pick the best one (or splice them together)
✓ Insecurity-aware editing: Strategic framing minimizes appearance concerns
✓ Camera Confidence Kit: 10-min video showing posture, eye contact, tone

items.question: What if I want to cancel?
items.answer:
We don't lock you into long term contracts, here's where we stand:
3-month minimum commitment
Month-to-month after that
30-90 day pause available for life events (maternity, illness, travel)
Cancel anytime after the first 3 months

items.question: Is my suburb still available?
items.answer:
That depends on when you're reading this.
We only work with one agent per suburb (territorial exclusivity). If another agent in your area signs up before you do, the opportunity is gone.
Right now: We're talking to 2-3 agents per week. Some suburbs get claimed within days.
The only way to know for sure: Book a call. We'll tell you immediately if your suburb is open or already taken.

items.question: What if I don't get results?
items.answer:
We're confident you will - but here's what happens if you don't see traction:
Month 1: We review your filming, content strategy, and posting schedule. Adjust as needed.
Month 2: We analyze your Celebrity Report data and double down on what's working.
Month 3: If you're still not seeing DMs or engagement growth, we'll troubleshoot until we figure out what's blocking you.
The reality: 90% of the time, results come down to consistency. Agents who film every week and trust the system see DMs by Month 2-3. Agents who skip weeks or overthink every video struggle.
Our promise: We'll give you the proven system. You provide 15 min/week. If you do your part, you'll see results.
